channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Collingwood extends winning streak to five with 21-point victory over Carlton as Josh Daicos battles through an ankle injury
item.description: Collingwood continued its strong late-season form with a 14.6 (90) to 10.9 (69) victory over Carlton at the MCG, recording a fifth consecutive AFL win and strengthening its prospects of securing at le...

item.title: Former San Beda Basketball Player Dies in Car Accident
item.description: Former San Beda Red Lion and Chiang Kai Shek College standout John Vincent 'JV' Gallego died on July 18, 2026, at the age of 28 after a road accident. Gallego was driving back to Manila on the North L...

item.title: REB encourages Tanzanian firms to boost productivity for international competitiveness
item.description: The article discusses how the Regional Economic Bloc (REB) is urging local businesses in Tanzania to enhance their operational efficiency and marketing strategies to better compete in the global marke...

item.title: Family pleads for justice as Govender brothers face murder trial
item.description: The father of Shailen Singh, a man murdered in December 2024 on Meridian Drive in Umhlanga, has expressed hope that the ongoing murder trial against security boss Ferrel Govender and his brother will ...

item.title: Floods destroy homes and claim life in Edo communities
item.description: A heavy downpour has caused severe flooding in Igarra, Akoko-Edo Local Government Area, destroying over 20 houses and affecting commercial, residential, and religious buildings. A motorcyclist named U...

item.title: Conservative Leader Criticizes Labour's Ambitious but Unrealistic Plans
item.description: Conservative leader Kemi Badenoch has accused Labour leader Andy Burnham of being a 'people pleaser' with 'airy fairy' plans, warning that his vision for government lacks clarity and practicality. Spe...

item.title: REB Encourages Local Firms to Showcase Efficiency for Global Markets
item.description: The article discusses the recent initiative by the Regional Economic Bloc (REB) to encourage Tanzanian companies to highlight their operational efficiency as a competitive advantage in the global mark...

item.title: Kwara State's Healthcare Reforms Show Steady Progress
item.description: The article highlights the transformative healthcare initiatives in Kwara State under Governor AbdulRahman AbdulRazaq. Key improvements include revitalized primary healthcare centers, upgraded general...

item.title: British runner Josh Kerr breaks men's mile world record with 3:42.66
item.description: British athlete Josh Kerr made history on Saturday by breaking the men's mile world record at a Diamond League meeting in London. The 28-year-old ran a time of 3 minutes, 42.66 seconds, surpassing the...

item.title: 21-Year-Old Charged with Vehicular Manslaughter After E-Bike Accident in Huntington Beach
item.description: Kolby Aipa, 20, the grandson of iconic surfboard shaper Ben Aipa, died after being towed on an e-bike by Brandon Scott Soleau, 21, while driving at over 50 mph on Pacific Coast Highway. Soleau faces a...

item.title: Kenya's Political Leaders Warn Against Tribalism and Division, Vow to Crack Down on Divisive Tactics
item.description: Farouk Kibet, President William Ruto's personal aide, has publicly criticized Rigathi Gachagua for promoting tribal politics and dividing Kenyans. Speaking in Western Kenya, Kibet accused Gachagua of ...

item.title: Solo Bettor Wins P20.1M PCSO Lotto 6/42 Jackpot on July 18, 2026
item.description: The Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO) announced that a single bettor from Pasay City correctly guessed the Lotto 6/42 number combination 27-32-39-26-12-07, winning a jackpot of nearly P20.2...

item.title: Canberra rugby clubs pay tribute to late hero Doug Lancaster
item.description: The Canberra rugby community gathered to honor the legacy of Doug Lancaster, a former cult hero whose impact on and off the field left an indelible mark. Tributes were paid at a John I Dent Cup game w...

item.title: Kerala faces erratic power cuts as KSEB ordered to improve reliability with 200 MW supply from Sunday
item.description: The Kerala State Electricity Regulatory Commission (KSERC) has reprimanded the Kerala State Electricity Board (KSEB) for its unpredictable load-shedding practices, directing it to provide advance noti...

item.title: U.S. Service Members Killed in Jordan Amid Escalating Conflict Over Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Two U.S. service members were killed by direct Iranian fire in Jordan, marking a tragic escalation in the ongoing conflict over control of the strategic Strait of Hormuz. Central Command confirmed the...

item.title: US visa policy shift impacts foreign journalists' stays
item.description: The Trump administration has implemented a significant change in US visa rules for foreign journalists, replacing the long-standing 'duration of status' system with fixed-term admissions. Under the ne...

item.title: Burnham's Decision on U.S. Use of UK Bases in Iran Conflict
item.description: Incoming UK Prime Minister Andy Burnham is facing a critical decision on whether to continue allowing U.S. President Donald Trump to use British military bases for strikes against Iran. The situation ...

item.title: Liberal Democrats Call for FA and UEFA to Withdraw from FIFA Over Integrity Concerns
item.description: The Liberal Democrats have called on the English Football Association (FA) and UEFA to withdraw from FIFA, accusing the organisation of undermining the integrity of football. Led by Sir Ed Davey, the ...

item.title: Ongoing US-Iran Conflict Escalates with Continued Bombardments and Retaliatory Strikes
item.description: The United States and Iran have engaged in a prolonged escalation of military conflict over the past week, marked by consecutive airstrikes from Washington and retaliatory strikes from Tehran. The sit...

item.title: The Age's Weekly Superquiz Puzzle Challenge
item.description: The article promotes The Age's Superquiz puzzle feature, offering readers a weekly challenge with a 10-clue, 25-square crossword format. Premium subscribers can access the Mini Crossword and other puz...
